tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set status enable
set interface "Port1"
set service "ICMP"
set srcaddr "all"
set destaddr "all"
set anomaly 
config tcp-udp
end
set log enable
set block-period 60
set per-ip-shreshold 50
set per-ip-mode enable
next
end"}
